feat.name: Opportunistic Grapple
feat.requirement: Your prey is within your reach, you have one free hand, and your target is no more than one size larger than you.
feat.text: You use an opening to capture your prey. You attempt an Athletics check to Grapple your prey.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: Your prey critically fails on an attack roll against you with a melee Strike.
